[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11111111 a
1 11011111 7
2 11100101 5
3 10111111 7
4 01011010 4
5 11111111 a
6 11011111 7
7 11110101 6

01 11100101 5 match 2
12 10111111 7 match 3
23 01011010 4 match 4
34 11111111 a match 0 5
45 11011111 7 match 1 6
56 11110101 6 match 7
67 10011011 5
70 11111111 a match 0 5
